expressions.name: exclusive_cumsum
expressions.formula: Given input tensor X of shape (N, L) with N = 32768, L = 32768, and cumulative axis dim = 1. For each batch index i in [0, N) and sequence index j in [0, L): Y[i, j] = 0 if j == 0 else sum_{k=0}^{j-1} X[i, k]. All sums are computed in float32.
expressions.boundary_treatment: When j = 0, the output is always 0. For j >= 1, the sum includes indices 0 to j-1. The implementation discards the last column (index L-1) via narrow, computes inclusive cumsum on the remaining L-1 columns, then prepends a zero column, so the final output Y has the same shape as X with the exclusive prefix sum property.
expressions.TDD_requirement: 以 PyTorch eager 执行结果为参考进行数值对拍。重点检查：输入形状 (32768, 32768) 下的输出正确性；边界索引 j=0 处是否为 0；最后一列 j=L-1 是否等于前 L-1 列的前缀和。建议先用小形状 (例如 (2,5)) 冒烟验证索引与边界逻辑，再用完整形状对拍。由于仅涉及精确的浮点累加，允许累加顺序带来的微小舍入差异，但公式语义必须一致。
